Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

(1 comment)

Nathaniel, is there any use for the "lustre_server.sh" script?  It was added in 2010, but I don't know if this relates to any of the modern HA resource agents or is just cruft that should be removed.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
> 
> (1 comment)
> 
> Nathaniel, is there any use for the "lustre_server.sh" script?  It was added in 2010, but I don't know if this relates to any of the modern HA resource agents or is just cruft that should be removed.

As far as I could tell, it's related to https://github.com/ClusterLabs/resource-agents/tree/main. This script seems to source https://github.com/ClusterLabs/resource-agents/blob/main/heartbeat/ocf-shellfuncs.in in particular. It seems like the main OCF tree was split at some point. So this script would fail without some refactoring. I was originally leaning towards deleting because of that.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> > Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
> > 
> > (1 comment)
> > 
> > Nathaniel, is there any use for the "lustre_server.sh" script?  It was added in 2010, but I don't know if this relates to any of the modern HA resource agents or is just cruft that should be removed.
> 
> As far as I could tell, it's related to https://github.com/ClusterLabs/resource-agents/tree/main. This script seems to source https://github.com/ClusterLabs/resource-agents/blob/main/heartbeat/ocf-shellfuncs.in in particular. It seems like the main OCF tree was split at some point. So this script would fail without some refactoring. I was originally leaning towards deleting because of that.

This script isn't supported by anyone, I think it would be best to remove it.  resource-agents has moved on from when this was written

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Mark this -1, it is better to remove lustre_server.sh completely.

Patch Set 2:

Ping

Patch Set 2:

Tim, when you ping on a patch, I would appreciate that you call out the non-reviewers by name.  That is more likely to get their attention, and also save me a round-trip from email to browser and back just to find out I've already reviewed a patch (which happens to me a lot).  Thanks.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

LGTM
Thanks!

parents.subject: LU-16763 tests: add more logging to run-llog.sh

commit.subject: LU-16694 misc: remove, update old scripts
commit.message:
LU-16694 misc: remove, update old scripts

There are two old checkstack.pl in-tree. Remove both and pull down
a new one from upstream.

There's only one script in lustre/contrib (lustre_server.sh). It
is meant for ClusterLabs resource-agents. But the script hasn't
been maintained. Hence, remove it.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: Id52ff11a7fa525b7ef20656df77c66a728e2b77a
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/50720
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Olaf Faaland <faaland1@llnl.gov>
Reviewed-by: Nathaniel Clark <nclark@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
